description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a natural wood grain finish, featuring two metal-handled drawers on the right side for storage. The desk is paired with a simple wooden chair that has a slatted backrest and a matching wood tone. On the left side of the desk, there is an adjustable black desk lamp with a round base and articulated arm. The underside of the desk is open on the left, providing legroom, while the right side is enclosed by the drawer unit. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for writing or placing office equipment. The overall design is functional and utilitarian, suitable for work or study environments.
description: A wooden desk with two drawers, a matching wooden chair, and a black adjustable desk lamp. The desk has a flat top, open leg space on the left, and a practical, sturdy design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the desk, the black desk lamp on top, and the chair tucked under the desk.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two metal-handled drawers, the chair positioned at the center, and the lamp on the left corner of the desk.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the desk's depth, the lamp, and the chair's backrest, with the drawers less visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the open leg space beneath the desk, the back of the chair, and the lamp on the right.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the drawers and open leg space, intended for the user to sit at the center with the chair pulled up to the desk. The drawers are on the right, and the lamp is positioned on the left corner of the desk surface.
